title: Everything You Need to Think Better
intro: From quick capture to deep work, Noty adapts to the way your mind works.

feature_cards.title: Rich Markdown
feature_cards.desc: Write with powerful markdown that comes alive.

feature_cards.title: Smart Organization
feature_cards.desc: Notebooks, tags, and a powerful search. Find any note in seconds, even years later.

feature_cards.title: Real-time Sync
feature_cards.desc: Seamlessly sync across all your devices. Start on your phone, continue on your laptop.

feature_cards.title: Templates & More
feature_cards.desc: Start fast with beautiful templates for meeting notes, journals, project plans, and more.

feature_cards.title: Offline First
feature_cards.desc: Your notes are always there, even without internet. Changes sync when you're back online.

feature_cards.title: AI-Powered
feature_cards.desc: Smart suggestions, automatic summaries, and intelligent search — your notes work for you.
